apihelp-query+checkuser-summary-api-disa:
{{doc-apihelp-summary|query+checkuser}}

This is used when the CheckUser API has been disabled (e.g. it will return no data when requests are made). Uses {{msg-mw|apihelp-query+checkuser-summary}}.
apierror-checkuser-timelimit:
{{doc-apierror}}
{{doc-important|Do not translate "-2 weeks" or "2 weeks ago". It must be in [http://www.php.net/strtotime original format].}}
checkuser-api-useragent-clienthints-revi:
Error message shown if POST request to /checkuser/v0/useragent-clienthints/{type}/{id} contains a revision ID that was not authored by the user making the API request. Parameters:
* $1 - The ID of the user making the request.
* $2 - The revision ID sent in the request.
checkuser-api-useragent-clienthints-mapp:
Error message shown if POST request to /checkuser/v0/useragent-clienthints/{type}/{id} results in handler code attempting to insert client hint mappings that already exist. Parameters:
* $1 - The identifier type, e.g. 'revision'.
* $2 - The ID of the data, e.g. 1234.
checkuser-api-useragent-clienthints-call:
Error message shown if POST request to /checkuser/v0/useragent-clienthints/revision/{id} results in handler code attempting to insert client hint mappings when the associated reference ID was performed too long ago. Parameters:
* $1 - The identifier type, e.g. 'revision'.
* $2 - The ID of the data, e.g. 1234.
checkuser-api-useragent-clienthints-none:
Error message shown if POST request to /checkuser/v0/useragent-clienthints/{type}/{id} is called with a non-existing identifier ID. For the 'revision' type, the {{msg-mw|rest-nonexistent-revision}} message is used instead of this one. Parameters:
* $1 - The identifier type, e.g. 'privatelog'.
* $2 - The ID of the data, e.g. 1234.
checkuser-api-useragent-clienthints-expl: Message shown in the response to the POST request to /checkuser/v0/useragent-clienthints/{type}/{id} if the request is successful. This is used to explain what this API request does and links to a MediaWiki page explaining the use of client hints in more detail.
apihelp-logout-param-checkuserclienthint: Help for the checkuserclienthints parameter supplied alongside requests to ApiLogout from clicks to the logout menu item in personal tools.
checkuser-ip-auto-reveal-expiry-invalid:
Error shown if a user provides an invalid expiry time to the globalpreferences API for the IP auto-reveal preference.

{{doc-apierror}}
checkuser-ip-auto-reveal-missing-permiss:
{{doc-apierror}}

Error shown if a user tries to set the IP auto-reveal preference when they cannot use that feature.
checkuser-suggestedinvestigations-case-u:
{{doc-apierror}}

Error message shown when a request to update a suggested investigations case is attempted passing an ID that does not correspond to an existing case

{{doc-apierror}}

Error message shown when a request to update a suggested investigations case is attempted but the suggested investigations feature is disabled
